description_long: This is a classic red fire extinguisher with a cylindrical metal body and a flat base for stability. The front features a prominent label with white and blue instructional text, including usage steps and safety information, as well as pictograms for quick reference. A black hose is attached near the top, looping down and secured to the side, with a metallic nozzle at the end for directing the extinguishing agent. The top of the extinguisher has a black handle and lever mechanism for operation, along with a metallic cap and a visible safety pin. The surface is smooth and glossy, reflecting light, and the overall build suggests durability and functionality for emergency use. This type of extinguisher is commonly found in public urban spaces, garages, and building corridors.
description: A red, cylindrical fire extinguisher with a black hose, instructional label, and a handle-lever mechanism on top. The surface is glossy and the object is designed for emergency fire suppression.
description_view_0: Front view showing the instructional label, safety pictograms, and the hose attached to the side.
description_view_1: Rear angled view with the label partially visible and the hose curving around the back.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the plain red cylinder, handle, and the full length of the hose.
description_view_3: Side view with the hose running vertically along the body and the label partially visible on the opposite side.
attribute_label_or_signage: Large rectangular label on the front with red, white, blue, and green sections, including text instructions, pictograms, and a fire extinguisher symbol.
attribute_hose_or_nozzle: Black hose attached near the top, looping down the side, with a metallic nozzle at the end; hose is secured to the body.
attribute_safety_pin_or_seal: Metallic safety pin visible at the top near the handle.
